corpus.title: 'Just chill, relax': Infantino defends World Cup visa issues, ticket prices
corpus.signal_text:
'Just chill, relax': Infantino defends World Cup visa issues, ticket prices

FIFA president Gianni Infantino defends soccer's governing body's handling of visa issues and ticket prices ahead of the World Cup.

corpus.title: Somali ref Omar Artan picked for UEFA Super Cup after US World Cup ban
corpus.signal_text:
Somali ref Omar Artan picked for UEFA Super Cup after US World Cup ban

Somali referee Omar Artan has been picked to officiate the showcase UEFA Super Cup game in August, just days after he was denied entry to the United States ahead of the World Cup tournament where he was due to work.

corpus.title: FIFA boss defends World Cup tickets prices and brushes off visa row
corpus.signal_text:
FIFA boss defends World Cup tickets prices and brushes off visa row

Gianni Infantino said it was 'unfortunate' that Somali referee, Omar Artan, had been denied entry to the US, adding that FIFA cannot dictate to governments.

corpus.title: Africa: Top African Referee Omar Artan to Officiate 2026 Uefa Super Cup After Being Unable to Participate in FIFA World Cup 2026
corpus.signal_text:
Africa: Top African Referee Omar Artan to Officiate 2026 Uefa Super Cup After Being Unable to Participate in FIFA World Cup 2026

[CAF] Artan has been on the FIFA international list since 2018 and was named CAF Men's Referee of the Year in 2025

corpus.country_label: Other Africa (Ethiopia, Ghana, Uganda, Tanzania, Senegal)
corpus.title: Artan to referee Uefa Super Cup after losing World Cup role
corpus.signal_text:
Artan to referee Uefa Super Cup after losing World Cup role

Somali referee Omar Artan is appointed to take charge of the Uefa Super Cup match between Paris St-Germain and Aston Villa later this summer after being denied a spot at the World Cup.

corpus.country_label: Other Africa (Ethiopia, Ghana, Uganda, Tanzania, Senegal)
corpus.title: Who is the Somali referee barred from entering the US for the World Cup?
corpus.signal_text:
Who is the Somali referee barred from entering the US for the World Cup?

Omar Artan was set to become the first Somali to referee a game at the World Cup finals, but his place in history has been denied by US immigration authorities.

corpus.title: Artan to referee Uefa Super Cup after losing World Cup role
corpus.signal_text:
Artan to referee Uefa Super Cup after losing World Cup role

Somali referee Omar Artan is appointed to take charge of the Uefa Super Cup match between Paris St-Germain and Aston Villa later this summer after being denied a spot at the World Cup.

corpus.title: FIFA boss Gianni Infantino tries to sidestep World Cup controversies
corpus.signal_text:
FIFA boss Gianni Infantino tries to sidestep World Cup controversies

Under-fire FIFA boss defends tenure as globe’s favourite football tournament kicks off with highest-ever World Cup ticket prices; Infantino plays down Trump tensions after ejection of Somali referee, avoids giving answers at press conference. Leer más

corpus.title: FIFA-Boss Infantino verteidigt Ticketpreise und Trump-Nähe
corpus.signal_text:
FIFA-Boss Infantino verteidigt Ticketpreise und Trump-Nähe

Einreiseverbote, teure Karten, US-Ermittlungen und die Nähe zu Donald Trump - FIFA-Präsident Gianni Infantino verteidigt sich und seinen Verband vor dem Start der Fußball-WM. Die laute Kritik perlt am FIFA-Boss ab.

corpus.title: WM-Schiedsrichter aus Somalia trotz Visum abgewiesen
corpus.signal_text:
WM-Schiedsrichter aus Somalia trotz Visum abgewiesen

Er sollte als erster somalischer Schiedsrichter WM-Geschichte schreiben. Stattdessen wurde Omar Artan trotz gültigen US-Visums am Flughafen in Miami gestoppt. Vor der WM 2026 häufen sich Berichte über Einreisehürden.

corpus.title: Somali referee denied US entry, dropped from FIFA World Cup 2026
corpus.signal_text:
Somali referee denied US entry, dropped from FIFA World Cup 2026

Omar Artan, Africa's top referee in 2025, was set to become the first Somali national to officiate at a FIFA World Cup before being denied entry by US authorities

corpus.title: Somali World Cup referee being denied entry to U.S. sparks global uproar
corpus.signal_text:
Somali World Cup referee being denied entry to U.S. sparks global uproar

Omar Artan had been chosen by soccer governing body FIFA to be one of 52 referees

corpus.title: Somali World Cup referee barred by US given hero’s welcome at home (VIDEO)
corpus.signal_text:
Somali World Cup referee barred by US given hero’s welcome at home (VIDEO)

Somali referee Omar Artan, who was set to officiate at the 2026 FIFA World Cup but was barred from the US, receives a hero’s welcome at home Read Full Article at RT.com

corpus.title: Fifa-Präsident Gianni Infantino: „Der Mann, der sich für Gott hält“
corpus.signal_text:
Fifa-Präsident Gianni Infantino: „Der Mann, der sich für Gott hält“

Gianni Infantino schwingt sich zum Alleinherrscher über den Weltfußball auf. Was könnte ihn jetzt noch stoppen? Womöglich seine Hybris – und die Justiz. Eine Beweisaufnahme zum WM-Start.

corpus.title: Somali referee Artan, banned by US, to officiate UEFA Super Cup
corpus.signal_text:
Somali referee Artan, banned by US, to officiate UEFA Super Cup

Omar Artan, turned away by the US as he was due to referee at the World Cup, will now officiate the UEFA Super Cup final.

corpus.title: The World Cup According to Gianni Infantino
corpus.signal_text:
The World Cup According to Gianni Infantino

FIFA’s powerful president is remaking global soccer in his own image. Can the sport survive him?
